## Type of change

- [ ] Ingestion

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pytest -q`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` in `apps/web` if frontend code changed
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior or commands changed
- [ ] I did not commit secrets or private data
- [ ] I preserved citation-first behavior
- [ ] I avoided unsupported claims for sensitive topics

Add screenshots, CLI output, or test logs if helpful.
